context: Tests whether the agent correctly configures New Relic as the OTLP backend for @adobe/aio-lib-telemetry, including the correct endpoint URL, authentication header name, exporter class names, signal wiring, and environment variable mapping in app.config.yaml.

checklist.name: New Relic OTLP endpoint
checklist.description: Uses the US OTLP endpoint `https://otlp.nr-data.net:4318` (or EU endpoint if explicitly chosen) as the base URL for exporters

checklist.name: api-key header (not Authorization)
checklist.description: Uses `"api-key"` as the header name for the New Relic license key — NOT `Authorization`, `Bearer`, or any other header name

checklist.name: Correct exporter class names
checklist.description: Uses `OTLPTraceExporterProto`, `OTLPMetricExporterProto`, `OTLPLogExporterProto` — not `OTLPTraceExporter` or other names without protocol suffix

checklist.name: Exporter imports from /otel
checklist.description: Imports OTLP exporter classes from `@adobe/aio-lib-telemetry/otel` (not from `@opentelemetry/*` packages directly or from other subpaths)

checklist.name: Metrics signal wiring
checklist.description: Metric exporter is wrapped in `PeriodicExportingMetricReader({ exporter: ... })` and assigned to `metricReaders` array — not passed as `metricExporter` or directly

checklist.name: Logs signal wiring
checklist.description: Log exporter is wrapped in `SimpleLogRecordProcessor(...)` and assigned to `logRecordProcessors` array — not as `logExporter` or passed directly

checklist.name: ENABLE_TELEMETRY in yaml
checklist.description: app.config.yaml includes `ENABLE_TELEMETRY: true` for both actions (or at the package level)

checklist.name: Env var with $VAR_NAME syntax
checklist.description: The New Relic license key is mapped in app.config.yaml using `$VAR_NAME` syntax (e.g., `NEW_RELIC_LICENSE_KEY: $NEW_RELIC_LICENSE_KEY`) rather than hardcoded

checklist.name: License key from params
checklist.description: The New Relic license key is accessed from `params` (e.g., `params.NEW_RELIC_LICENSE_KEY`) inside the defineTelemetryConfig callback

checklist.name: Correct per-signal endpoint paths
checklist.description: Each exporter uses the correct path suffix: `/v1/traces` for traces, `/v1/metrics` for metrics, `/v1/logs` for logs
